qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist B stable-hit rewrite: deterministic helper-focused patches aligned with current preclass.c

executionHints.description: Each development round keeps one deterministic patch and preserves state-only replay behavior

d1ResetRequirement.notes: Checklist B uses state-only resets during routine replay but still requires explicit reset when D1 runs

D1.description: Extract v4 special-result forwarding into a dedicated helper

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v4_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	wc_preclass_set_special_tuple\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, reason_value\);?
\}

D2.description: Extract v6 special-result forwarding into a dedicated helper

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v6_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	wc_preclass_set_special_tuple\(cls, rir, reason, confidence, reason_value\);?
\}

D3.description: Extract reserved future-use reason literal to helper for explicit intent

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v4_reserved_future_use_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	\*cls = wc_preclass_class_reserved_literal\(\);?
	\*rir = wc_preclass_rir_none_literal\(\);?
	\*reason = "V4_FUTURE_USE_240_4";?
	\*confidence = wc_preclass_confidence_high_literal\(\);?
\}

D4.description: Extract unknown-hint fallback writeback into dedicated helper

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_allocated_hint\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(wc_preclass_has_rir_hint_value\(guessed_rir\)\) \{?
		\*cls = wc_preclass_class_allocated_hint_literal\(\);?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*reason = wc_preclass_reason_rir_hint_value_literal\(\);?
		\*confidence = wc_preclass_confidence_medium_hint_literal\(\);?
		return;?
	\}?
	wc_preclass_set_unknown_hint_tuple\(cls,?
		rir,?
		reason,?
		confidence,?
		wc_preclass_reason_no_rir_hint_value_literal\(\)\);?
\}
